root.description: Working directory override for this pane.

command.description: Command to run in this pane.

split.description: Split direction when creating this pane. Horizontal splits side-by-side; vertical splits top-bottom. Default is vertical.

root.description: Project root directory. Supports ~ expansion and variable interpolation.

command.description: Command for a single-window session. Mutually exclusive with windows.

on_start.description: Commands sent to the first pane after the session is created.

on_ready.description: Commands sent to the first pane once at the end of the initial session build.

on_detach.description: Commands run each time a client detaches.

on_stop.description: Commands run when the session is closed.

env.description: Environment variables set for all panes via tmux set-environment.

vars.description: Custom variables for {{var}} interpolation in config values.

windows.description: Window definitions. Mutually exclusive with command.

name.description: Window name shown in the tmux status bar.

root.description: Working directory override. Relative paths resolve against project root.

layout.description: Tmux pane layout. Also accepts custom tmux layout strings.

command.description: Command for a single-pane window. Mutually exclusive with panes.

env.description: Environment variables set in all panes of this window. Merged with project-level env; window values take precedence.

panes.description: Pane definitions. Mutually exclusive with command.
